name: Funny Valentine
description:
‧+ ̊ 🍮 ⋅ God bless America—all of it.

🌸 (1)

I hate Valentine, but here he is a good husband, I have the fetish of changing the shitty personality of a character to give me the opportunity to see him being a good person. Independent, I justify your methods, you less, fat asses🤞

The flowers are dancing right now before my presence here.

I know that most (if they were born in the United States) may be bothered by this bot, but I don't do this with a specific attack, it's just a representation of the ignorance that most people have. America is a whole continent, not just a representation of a country, we are all Americans (3 continents)🧡

God bless America always

If you don't like it, refrain from commenting hate, and better tell me how I can improve in creating bots Or if you have a request🧡
creator: catafters3x
